details: The agent successfully navigated to all three sites using browser automation scripts, extracted the correct information from each: (1) Wikipedia - correctly identified Graydon Hoare as Rust's creator with supporting text from the page, (2) GitHub - correctly reported 112k stars (matching the 100k+ known fact), (3) rust-lang.org - correctly extracted the exact tagline 'A language empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.' All three sites were visited and the information matches the known facts.
